name: resend-meetup-demo-quality-validators
description: Boring quality validators for Resend meetup demo lead triage.

validators.name: Evidence required
validators.description: Every non-zero tier must cite concrete account and person evidence.
checks: tier 1, 2, and 3 outputs include non-empty reasons
reasons reference observed role, company, category, and employee-count evidence when required
meetup attendance alone is never enough for tier 1, 2, or 3

validators.name: Low confidence handled
validators.description: Sparse, inferred, stale, or ambiguous evidence lowers confidence instead of getting over-promoted.
checks: confidence is high only when LinkedIn plus current company evidence are present
confidence is medium when LinkedIn is present but company enrichment is incomplete
confidence is low when identity or account evidence is sparse
ambiguous founder/company matches stay tier 0 or review-needed
outputs never invent missing title, company, LinkedIn, X, account category, or employee count

validators.name: Exclusions respected
validators.description: Hard exclusions override otherwise good-looking ICP fit.
checks: known_contact forces tier 0 when trusted CRM, customer, opportunity, contact, or relationship evidence strongly matches the lead
investor_only, early_career, speaker_or_host, sales_only, and freelancer matches force tier 0
exclusions_matched contains every applied exclusion id

validators.name: Output contract pure
validators.description: ICP evaluation does not smuggle in next actions.
checks: outputs contain only account_fit, person_fit, tier, confidence, reasons, and exclusions_matched
outputs do not include recommended_next_actions, outreach instructions, campaign names, provider payloads, or send decisions
known-contact checks use a trusted source of truth such as CRM, customer, opportunity, contact, or relationship data
